# PHIL.093 ? Philosophy of Mathematics

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** specialized_interdisciplinary
**Subcategory:** philosophy_of_mathematics
**Domain:** SPECIALIZED_INTERDISCIPLINARY
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Nature of mathematical truth; platonism vs nominalism; foundations; mathematical ontology; logicism, intuitionism, formalism

## Application
Examine mathematical foundations; ontology of numbers; truth nature; foundational programs; mathematical reasoning

## Key Values
- Mathematical truth
- Foundations
- Ontology
- Logic
